title: Dense Rich Spanish Rice Paella
description: A show‑off Spanish paella that packs a fragrant punch of saffron, lemon, and tender seafood, all in a thick, creamy rice bed. Gluten‑free and packed with flavor, it’s a standout dish for any dinner gathering.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a paella pan over medium heat.
Add diced onion and minced garlic, sauté until translucent.
Stir in sliced chorizo and cook until it releases its oils.
Sprinkle smoked paprika and saffron, cooking for 30 seconds to release aromas.
Add rice and stir until grains are well coated and slightly toasted.
Pour in chicken broth and water, bring to a gentle boil.
Reduce heat, simmer uncovered until the rice absorbs most liquid, about 15 minutes.
Gently fold in shrimp and mussels, placing them evenly on top of the rice.
Cover the pan with a lid or foil and cook until mussels open and shrimp turn pink, about 5 minutes.
Squeeze lemon slices over the paella, garnish with fresh lemon wedges, and serve hot.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
